# Service Operation Boundary

## Purpose
This document defines what JobCard foundation does and does not include.

## Included in JobCard Foundation
The JobCard foundation may include:
- reception record
- customer link
- vehicle link
- intake mileage
- customer complaint
- requested service summary
- initial notes
- status
- history

## Excluded From JobCard Foundation
The JobCard foundation does not include:
- detailed labor operations
- mechanic task assignment
- parts request
- inventory reservation
- purchase request
- customer approval
- invoice
- payment
- delivery settlement
- warranty claim

## Future Service Operation Scope
A future mission may define:
- service operation table
- technician assignment
- operation status
- labor time
- parts requirement
- approval flow
- QC checklist

## Mission 17 Boundary
Mission 17 must not create service operation rows.

## Final Boundary Decision
JobCard foundation is the intake and control header only.
